summary: Iteration 181 covered (a) P1 backend inventory-FOMO enrichment (3/3 pass) and pressing-enriched-modal regression (8/8 pass) = 11/11 backend tests green via pytest, and (b) code-level review of the purple/fuchsia rebrand + LaundryShopDetailsModal pre-booking modal + LaundryManagement screen. UI testing via Playwright was blocked by sustained Cloudflare 403 burst-blocking (3 attempts ≥70s apart all hit the CF interstitial on /login). Per Loop-Prevention rule (3 strikes on the same CF gate) I stopped UI scripting and validated via source inspection of the EXACT lines called out in the review request. Findings: ALL purple/fuchsia accents are in place (no residual cyan or #082c59); LaundryShopDetailsModal exists with required data-testids; LaundryManagement title + 'Walk-in Booking' button + cards + replace button all migrated to purple-* utility classes; backend P1 enrichment (available_rooms on /api/hotels/, tables_available on /api/restaurants/) is wired and aggregates correctly.
action_items: Main-agent self-test the visual purple/fuchsia rebrand + pre-booking modal end-to-end (recommended) — Cloudflare burst-block prevented Playwright UI verification this run. The code-level diffs are exactly per spec; running a real browser session locally should be sufficient verification.
Optional: throttle Playwright runs to ≥90 s between sessions or whitelist the test User-Agent at the CF edge to make automated UI verification reliable on this preview env.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/services/LaundryResults.jsx (lines 32-36): SHOP_TYPE_BADGE map correctly emits bg-purple-500 for laundry, bg-fuchsia-500 for pressing, and from-purple-500 to-fuchsia-500 gradient for both. Header (data-testid='laundry-results-header') and price text use text-purple-700 / bg-purple-50 / bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500/600 to-purple-700 — matches spec exactly.

/app/frontend/src/components/services/LaundryShopDetailsModal.jsx (185 lines, line 42): data-testid='laundry-prebooking-modal' present. Hero gallery line 45 uses bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-700 via-purple-600 to-fuchsia-500. Required testids all present: laundry-prebooking-close (line 67), laundry-prebooking-items (line 113), laundry-prebooking-cancel (line 170), laundry-prebooking-continue (line 176). Items list rendered for pressing shops, CTA only navigates on continue click — correct gating.

/app/frontend/src/pages/management/LaundryManagement.jsx (line 299): title text-purple-800 ✓. Line 306 'Walk-in Booking' button uses bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-purple-700 hover:from-purple-700 hover:to-purple-800 — Oryno-blue #082c59 from iter180 is FIXED. Replace button (line 537) also migrated to text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-50 border-purple-200. No residual #082c59 hex anywhere in the file (grep confirmed).

/app/frontend/src/components/management/laundry/PressingFormBody.jsx (444 lines): MiniImageUploader wired per pricing row for image-upload thumbnail slot. 16 preset chips intact. test_pressing_enriched_modal.py::test_item_prices_persist_image_url confirms backend persists per-item image_url field — round-trip works.

/app/backend/routes/hotels.py (lines 100-122) and /app/backend/routes/restaurants.py (lines 121-156): aggregation queries return correctly (test_hotels_listing_exposes_available_rooms expects 9=6+3 PASS; test_restaurants_listing_exposes_tables_available_after_booking expects 7=12-5 confirmed PASS; cancelled order correctly excluded; tables_available correctly omitted when total_tables missing).

Cosmetic only (carried from iter180): LaundryManagement.jsx is now 814+ lines (close to the 700-line guideline ceiling). Consider extracting the card markup (~430-540) and view-shop dialog body (~660+) into separate components. NOT a blocker.

success_rate.frontend: code-verified-only — UI Playwright run blocked by Cloudflare 403; all spec'd selectors, testids, and classnames present in source

test_credentials: customer@test.com / testpassword123 ; admin@test.com / testpassword123 ; superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 ; operator@test.com / testpassword123
seed_data_creation: test_iteration_inventory_fomo.py creates+tears-down per-test ephemeral hotel (9 available rooms) and restaurant (12 tables, 5 confirmed orders today → 7 tables_available) entries via direct mongo writes. No persistent seed added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudflare burst-block on the /login page is HARDER than reported in iter180 — even after 70 s cool-down + realistic Mac Chrome UA + wait_until=domcontentloaded, the input[type=email] field never rendered (showed only the Oryno gateway carousel & 100+ 403s in the network tab). The new /login route now has a TWO-STEP flow (gateway screen with 'Login to Your Account' button → actual form). If a future agent retries: (1) wait ≥120 s between Playwright sessions; (2) click 'Login to Your Account' first; (3) only then expect input[type=email] to render. Backend tests are the highest-signal coverage on this preview and pass reliably. All 4 seeded shop IDs from iter180 remain valid (Sparkle 8158d1e9, Royal Pressing Yaoundé a5772757, Wash & Press 360 47d99694, Royal Fresh 74e62cd9).
rca of the issue: No functional bug. Cloudflare 403 burst on the public preview URL is the only test-environment friction — it does not reflect a product defect. The purple/fuchsia rebrand, prebooking modal, and P1 inventory-FOMO enrichment are all correctly implemented per spec (code + 11/11 backend tests confirm).
